AGENTS.md.purpose: verify the repo instructions stay visible

Cargo.toml.purpose: verify the package manifest stays parseable

Justfile.purpose: verify the lane wrapper stays runnable

README.md.purpose: verify the repo README stays in sync

.gitlab-ci.yml.purpose: verify the GitLab pipeline stays dispatch-only

agent/.purpose: verify the Jankurai metadata bundle stays parseable

ops/ci/.purpose: verify the shell lane scripts stay runnable

src/.purpose: verify the crate body and smoke test stay green
